input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

The lighting is bright and consistent.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-8] A man with short dark hair and a receding hairline, wearing a white lab coat over a dark shirt, stands centered against a wall covered in vintage propaganda posters. He speaks directly to the camera, with visible Russian text on the posters including "НЕ БОЛТАЙ!" and "Болтун - находка для врага!". Between seconds 2 and 4, he raises his hands and puts on clear safety glasses with dark frames, adjusting them before continuing to speak. [8-14] The view cuts to a glossy black table where hands in white sleeves arrange kitchen items. A clear glass measuring cup with red markings is placed centrally. To its left, a white mug with blue stripes and cartoon figures is set down. On the right, a bottle of yellow olive oil with a green cap appears. Finally, a large white and blue bag labeled "Gold Medal All Purpose Flour" is placed on the far left next to the mug. [16-18] A brown rectangular container labeled "HERSHEY'S COCOA" is positioned on the table before hands bring a clear plastic water bottle with a "Blue Moon Water" label into the frame. [18-20] The water bottle is laid horizontally in front of a flour bag and

[76-80] A hand places a white mug featuring blue stripes and cartoon figures, filled with dark brown batter, onto the glass turntable inside a white microwave. The door closes, and a hand presses buttons on the control panel, lighting up the green digital display to show the text 'EXPRESS' as the microwave begins to operate. [80-84] The microwave door opens, revealing the illuminated interior cavity. A hand reaches inside and grasps the handle of the white mug. Hands in white sleeves position the mug on the black table. A hand pours a thick white liquid from a small container with a brown and yellow striped rim into the mug. [84-86] A hand holds an empty small container while the other hand uses a white plastic spoon to stir the thick white liquid into the dark brown batter inside the mug.

[86-88] A hand displays an empty small cup with a yellow rim and white interior while another hand stirs a greyish-brown solution in a mug with a white plastic spoon. [88-96] A person in a white coat pours a translucent amber liquid from an orange plastic bottle featuring fruit graphics into the white mug, which is decorated with blue stripes and cartoon figures. The mug rests on a black table surface scattered with white powder and contains a light mixture with dark chunks. The pouring action ceases as the bottle is lifted away, leaving the white spoon inside the mixture.

[96-98] The pouring of amber liquid from an orange bottle stops as it is lifted from a large white mug on a black table. The scene cuts to a man in a white coat and safety glasses speaking to the camera, with various vintage propaganda posters visible on the wall behind him, including text "НЕ БОЛТАЙ!", "Болтун - находка для врага!", and partial text "СТРОГО ХРА". [98-102] The man stirs a thick brown mixture inside the white mug decorated with blue stripes and cartoon figures. He lifts a white plastic spoon containing the brown substance towards his mouth to eat while looking forward. [102-106] Holding the mug firmly, the man speaks directly to the camera with visible mouth movements. The white plastic spoon remains inside the mug as he gestures slightly against the background of posters. [106-108] The man removes his safety glasses, holding the eyewear in his right hand while speaking. The white mug featuring blue stripes and cartoon figures remains partially visible in his left hand at the bottom of the frame.

A man in a white lab coat stands before a wall of vintage posters featuring Cyrillic text like "НЕ БОЛТАЙ!". He speaks directly to the camera, initially holding his right hand near his chest. He then extends his arm to point his index finger emphatically at the viewer before lowering his hand. Throughout the sequence, he maintains direct eye contact while speaking, eventually resting with his hands out of view.

recent_thinks: [14-16] A yellow bag featuring the word "SUGAR" in blue text is placed onto the black table. It is positioned behind the clear glass measuring cup with red markings. Hands in white sleeves adjust the bag next to the flour bag and olive oil bottle, finalizing the group of items on the surface.

[42-44] A clear bottle with a green cap containing yellow liquid is poured into a metal spoon held over the white mug on the black table. The brown cocoa container previously held in the right hand is no longer visible. The spoon, containing brown residue, catches the stream of oil.

[118-120] A man in a white lab coat continues facing the camera directly against a wall of vintage posters. He speaks with visible mouth movements, maintaining eye contact. His expression shifts slightly as he talks, but his position remains centered and static without new gestures or objects appearing in the frame.

queries.question: Which brand name appears on the white paper bag of flour sitting on the black countertop? A. Bella Tavola B. Blue Moon C. Gold Medal D. Stonemill Essentials

samples.output: <think>The man in the white lab coat remains centered in the frame, facing the camera directly while speaking. His mouth moves visibly as he talks, maintaining steady eye contact with the viewer. His position is static with no new gestures or objects introduced. The background of vintage propaganda posters remains unchanged behind him throughout this segment.</think><answer></answer>

Continuing a high-angle shot, hands clad in white sleeves vigorously mix a thick, dark brown, glossy batter inside a white mug featuring blue stripes and cartoon graphics. A silver spoon stirs the mixture rapidly against the ceramic walls, coating the sides. Scattered white powder residue is visible on the black table surface surrounding the mug base.

[76-80] A hand places a white mug featuring blue stripes and cartoon figures, filled with dark brown batter, onto the glass turntable inside a white microwave. input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
